opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: He has been drinking jugs of ice water all day but is still urinating constantly, and now he is talking nonsense and can barely stay awake.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Spouse calling out-of-hours because over the last few hours he has become confused and very drowsy after a week of endless thirst and urinating, and she is frightened.

symptom_narrative.onset: the thirst and constant urinating built up over the past week; the confusion and drowsiness came on suddenly in the last 3 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: about a week of thirst and urinating; a few hours of confusion
symptom_narrative.character: endless thirst with a strong craving specifically for ice-cold water, passing huge amounts of very pale urine, and now muddled speech and barely staying awake
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: spouse says it is the worst she has ever seen him — he is not making sense and she cannot keep him awake
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole body — thirst, urinating, and now his mind
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant day and night; he has been up all night going to the toilet
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — he drinks and drinks but it does not help
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: spouse tried to stop him drinking so much earlier today to cut down the toilet trips, and shortly after that he got much worse and confused
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: getting up many times overnight to pass urine, exhaustion during the day
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before that the spouse recalls
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: now bedbound and confused, completely dependent on his spouse

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular medicines that the spouse is aware of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse who is present and made the call; spouse is the informant as he is too drowsy to speak for himself

objective_data_offered.value: passing enormous amounts of urine, more than 10 large jugs a day, going to the toilet almost constantly
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's estimate of volume, not measured

objective_data_offered.value: his urine looks completely clear and colourless, like plain water
drinking jugs of ice water all day and always wanting it ice-cold
he is confused, talking nonsense, and can barely stay awake
his mouth and lips look completely dry and cracked
